title: memo-legal.md output schema (legal-contract-review)
description: Full CRAC memo (Conclusion - Rule - Analysis - Conclusion) for the contract under review, with document-level citations per Harvey BigLaw Bench convention.

conclusion.description: 1-3 sentences — the bottom-line legal position on the contract

rule.description: applicable rules (statutory / case law / regulatory) with §refs

analysis.description: issue-by-issue application of rule to facts; carve-outs noted

citation.description: e.g. '民法 §247-1', '智慧財產法院 102 年度民營訴字第 6 號'

supports.description: which CRAC point this citation backs

verified.description: true if the citation has been verified against primary source

url.description: link to 全國法規資料庫 / 司法院判決系統 / 主管機關

carve_outs.description: exceptions / boundary conditions the LLM identified — keeps the memo from over-stating coverage
